name: Upsells: Recommend

title.fr: Recommander des produits pour un client

description.en: Generate personalized product or service recommendations for a customer based on their history and preferences.
description.de: Personalisierte Produkt- oder Dienstleistungsempfehlungen fuer einen Kunden basierend auf Verlauf und Praeferenzen generieren.
description.fr: Generer des recommandations personnalisees de produits ou services pour un client en fonction de son historique et de ses preferences.
description.es: Generar recomendaciones personalizadas de productos o servicios para un cliente basadas en su historial y preferencias.
description.ro: Genereaza recomandari personalizate de produse sau servicii pentru un client pe baza istoricului si preferintelor sale.
description.it: Generate personalized product or service recommendations for a customer based on their history and preferences.

bot: When this warp is triggered: fetches the contact's activity history and generates recommendations for the business owner to review.

inputs.name: Contact

description.de: Fuer welchen Kunden soll empfohlen werden?

inputs.bot: The contact ID of the customer to generate recommendations for.

inputs.name: Context

description.fr: Contexte supplementaire (ex. 'vient d avoir un massage')
description.es: Contexto adicional (ej. 'acaba de tener un masaje')
description.ro: Context suplimentar (ex. 'tocmai a avut un masaj')

inputs.bot: Optional additional context about the customer's current situation to improve recommendations.

actions.prompt: Based on this customer's activity history: {{_DATA}}, and this context: {{context}}, recommend 2-3 relevant products or services. Explain why each is relevant.
